decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_m34-sbs, the canonical registry record for M34 Select Bus Service on 34th Street, Manhattan. Payload fields (route_id=M34, route_type=Select Bus Service, borough=Manhattan, service_variant=sbs) match exactly. The nearest other M34 records (route_m34-local-*) are local variants, not SBS, so no link to a different record is warranted. Per policy, when the best match is the observation's own base_record_id the decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Will be implemented on M34, with expansion citywide
